services.title: Dental Excellence
services.subtitle: Cutting-edge care blending surgical precision with luxury aesthetics

implants.name: Dental Implants
implants.desc: Premium permanent solutions, placed with surgical precision by Dr. Kadri Badr using Nobel Biocare & Straumann implants.

veneers.name: Veneers & Hollywood Smile
veneers.desc: Ultra-thin EMAX veneers for a perfect, natural, celebrity-worthy smile that lasts a lifetime.

whitening.name: Advanced Whitening
whitening.desc: Professional laser and light systems for a brilliant white smile in a single session.

design.name: Digital Smile Design
design.desc: 3D digital simulation of your ideal smile before any treatment. See your result before we begin.

reconstruction.name: Full Smile Reconstruction
reconstruction.desc: Comprehensive smile restoration for complex cases with a fully personalized treatment plan.

emergency.name: Dental Emergency
emergency.desc: Priority availability for acute pain, fractures, and emergency dental care around the clock.

international.title: Your Smile Destination in Morocco
international.subtitle: Save up to 70% compared to European rates with zero compromise on quality.
international.why_1_desc: 70% less than in France, Belgium, or Switzerland. European-certified quality.
international.why_2_desc: Complete treatment plan in 5–10 days. Plan your trip and your smile in one go.
international.why_3_desc: Hotel booking, airport transfers, medical translation. Full VIP service from start to finish.
international.why_4_desc: State-of-the-art equipment: 3D scanner, CEREC, CE/ISO-certified materials.

doctor.name: Dr. Kadri Badr
doctor.title: Dental Surgeon — Aesthetic Specialist
doctor.bio: Trained in Europe's and the Middle East's finest institutions, Dr. Kadri Badr combines cutting-edge surgical expertise with a refined sense of dental aesthetics to create exceptional smiles.

results.title: Before & After
results.subtitle: Results that speak for themselves — every case unique, treated with care.

testimonials.title: Trust From Around the World
testimonials.subtitle: Over 500 international patients trust us every year.
testimonials.t1_text: I had my veneers done by Dr. Kadri Badr after comparing several clinics. Perfect result, 65% savings, and VIP treatment. I recommend to all my friends!
testimonials.t2_text: Came for implants, left with a smile I never had before. Dr. Kadri is an exceptional surgeon. Everything was perfectly organized.
testimonials.t3_text: The digital simulation before treatment completely reassured me. I could visualize my smile before we even started. Five-star service!
testimonials.t4_text: Swiss quality at Moroccan prices. Ultra-modern equipment, impeccable sterilization. Dr. Kadri delivered far more than I hoped for.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know to plan your dental care in Morocco.
faq.q1: How long does a complete treatment take?
faq.a1: Most complete aesthetic treatments (veneers, single implants) require 5 to 10 days. We create a personalized schedule tailored to your stay.
faq.q2: How do I get a free quote?
faq.a2: Send us your dental photos via WhatsApp or our form. You'll receive a detailed estimate within 24 hours, with no obligation.
faq.q3: Are the materials of European quality?
faq.a3: Absolutely. We exclusively use CE/ISO-certified materials: Nobel Biocare zirconia, EMAX Ivoclar, Straumann implants. 10-year warranty.
faq.a4: Yes. We coordinate with partner hotels in Fès (3★ to 5★) and can arrange airport transfers and full-stay support.
faq.q5: Is there follow-up after I return home?
faq.a5: Phone and WhatsApp follow-up is guaranteed. Check-up consultations are available on your next visit or via video teleconsultation.
faq.more_questions: Have other questions? We reply in under an hour.
